data.title: Duni Group wins Gold at IDA 2025 for Vista product range - blending design, functionality, sustainability.
data.description: In recent news, Duni Group has received a prestigious Gold Award at the International Design Awards (IDA) 2025 for its Vista product range, showcasing an innovative packaging line that blends design, functionality, and sustainability. The recognition was achieved in MALMÖ, Sweden on January 20th, 2026. IDA is a renowned platform for creatives, and Duni's success highlights their dedication to excellence.

data.title: Quadient assists MedExpress with digital transformation, automating prescription workflows for improved efficiency.
data.description: A new study reveals that as of 2021, over 3.2 million people in the United States have been diagnosed with a rare medical condition known as POTS (Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome). POTS is characterized by an abnormal increase in heart rate when a person stands up, leading to symptoms like lightheadedness, fatigue, and fainting. The study also found that the majority of POTS patients are women, with 80% of those diagnosed being female. Despite its prevalence, POTS remains largely misunderstood and underdiagnosed, highlighting the need for greater awareness and research in the medical community.

data.title: G Square buys majority stake in Finnish MedTech company Serres to drive global growth and sustainability.
data.description: In Espoo, Finland on January 20, 2026, G Square, a prominent European healthcare private equity investor specializing in mid-market companies with strong growth opportunities, has announced a deal to purchase a controlling interest in Serres. Serres is a leading global company in sustainable surgical fluid management. The acquisition involves G Square acquiring a majority stake in Serres, further solidifying their position in the healthcare sector.

data.title: German Armed Forces contracts Circus SE for CA-1 AI robot to provide autonomous supply to soldiers at barracks.
data.description: A global AI robotics company, Circus SE, has secured a contract from the German Armed Forces for the deployment of the CA-1 AI robot for autonomous supply. The contract involves introducing the system at a military barracks in Germany to ensure constant and dependable supply to stationed soldiers. This initiative aims to eliminate reliance on duty hours or return times from military activities. The company's unique ISIN DE000A2YN355 and XETRA code CA1 further identify it.

data.title: Backlash mounts as Trove keeps $9.4M, new token plunges 95% after switching to Solana from Hyperliquid, enraging initial supporters.
data.description: Last week, Trove surprised the public with a sudden shift to move its perps DEX from Hyperliquid to Solana. This decision caused dismay among a significant portion of its initial supporters.

data.title: Equinor ASA conducting buy-back of shares for employee share programmes (OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR).
data.description: Details have been released regarding transactions carried out as part of Equinor ASA's buy-back initiative. The programme involves shares designated for the company's employee and management incentive schemes. Equinor ASA, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under OSE:EQNR and on the New York Stock Exchange under NYSE:EQNR, has reported on the specific number of shares involved in this strategy.
